topics: Thermodynamics systems- Properties of a system -State and equilibrium

Temperature and Zeroth law of thermodynamics. First law of Thermodynamics: First law for a closed system undergoing a cycle-Enthalpy- specific heats PMM1, first law of thermodynamics for steady flow process, SFEE
Kelvin-Planck and Clausius statements and its equivalence - Refrigerators
heat pump - COP - PMM II - Reversible and irreversible process Carnot’s theorem - Entropy -The Clausius inequality - Availability and irreversibility. Pure Substances: Pure substances
p-v and p-T diagram of pure substance
steam tables. Property calculations using steam tables
equivalent gas constant and molecular weight
introduction to real gas mixtures-Kay’s rule. General Thermodynamic Relations: Combined first and second law equations - Helmholtz and Gibb’s functions - Maxwell’s relations
Tds equations (Derivations not required). The clapeyron equation throttling process
convection and radiation-Fourier’s law of heat conduction (1 dimensional only). Thermal conductivity of materials
Newton’s law of cooling (1 dimensional only). Radiation: Basic concepts of thermal radiation

Stefan-boltzmann law and Planck’s Law. Heat Exchangers: Introduction and types of heat exchangers-parallel flow and counter-flow heat exchangers. Concept of overall heat transfer coefficient using LMTD and NTU methods
